reason: Successfully tested agent messaging: navigated to app, found agent, sent math question, and verified correct response containing "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with title "Gamut"
Found "QA-20260720-163443-k9s9" agent in sidebar and clicked it - Agent page loaded successfully, showing agent details
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status shows "idle", which is one of the acceptable states
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message typed into input field and send button clicked successfully
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - Agent processed the message and responded within 2 seconds
Verified the response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Response clearly displays "4" as the answer, screenshot captured showing the complete chat exchange
